description: Held-out evaluation set — queries not used to develop AGENT.md corrections
purpose: Independent validation that agent improvements generalize beyond training queries. These queries were not available to the team when writing AGENT.md corrections 001-009.

stockindex.rationale: No stockindex-specific corrections exist in AGENT.md. All 9 corrections target Yelp failure patterns (cross-DB join key, mixed dates, unstructured text, attribute parsing). The stockindex dataset tests whether the agent's general reasoning and the domain-agnostic rules (R1-R4) generalize to a different domain and schema.

yelp.note: All 7 Yelp queries were used to develop and validate AGENT.md corrections 001-009. They are the training set and cannot serve as held-out evaluation. Scores on these queries measure training-set fit, not generalization.

held_out_stockindex.notes: All 3 stockindex queries pass with repair logic in eval/harness.py. Strict pass (exact string match) is 0% due to formatting; repaired pass (numeric extraction) is 100%.

training_yelp_peak.notes: Sprint 1 peak. 3 of 7 Yelp queries pass. Queries 1, 2, 6 passed. Improvement is the Sprint 2 goal.
